name_cn:
PAPILLON TRUNK Handbag #️⃣M57835
Exclusive global launch! This item is crafted with the same custom Italian production process as authentic pieces, featuring dynamic chip serial numbers, original factory materials, and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic pieces).
Please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure a 100% faithful reproduction of the authentic look! Exclusive original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, and the latest official website gift box.
19 x 9 x 9 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Hardware
S-lock clasp
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 30.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 52.0 cm
Chain: Removable
Chain half-length: 55.0 cm
Made in Italy
